entry.title: New Overwatch Lucio skin enters Heroes of the Storm!
entry.summary: The Ruby Chromesthesia Lucio skin can now be unlocked in Heroes of the Storm. The patch also introduces the mighty Slapathur ability!

entry.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves has an insane DLC schedule, but it may not be enough to bring the sauce
entry.summary: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves devs are going ham with the DLC, dropping tons of characters. But do they have the sauce?

entry.title: Fortnite's latest Sprite trailer features an 'Obsession' crossover – could skins be next?
entry.summary: Fortnite skins based on the film Obsession have become a real possibility following a recent collaboration with the film!

entry.title: Team Vitality Celebrates MWI at EWC 2026 win by eating giant croissants
entry.summary: Team Vitality wins a back-to-back MWI at EWC 2026 championship title after defeating NAVI PH in a six-round series.

entry.title: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows yet after PlayTime's scandal at the Esports World Cup
entry.summary: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.

entry.title: Bounty Summer’s qualifier kicks off the new CS2 season: Tons of matches to test fresh rosters
entry.summary: It's always intriguing to follow the qualifiers of the BLAST Bounty tournament series. The online mayhem at the season’s start often treats us to big surprises!

entry.title: Every major Counter-Strike 2 update, explained
entry.summary: Valve is traditionally slow to release big CS2 updates, but time after time, we receive fundamental changes to the game. They shape the experience for casual and pro players alike.

entry.title: All VALORANT Maps explained: From Ascent to Summit
entry.summary: What's your favorite map feature?

entry.title: All CS2 maps explained
entry.summary: The Counter-Strike 2 (CS2) community has clear preferences for map picks in pro and casual play. The reasons often lie in the balance between two team roles and the variety of strategies.

entry.title: T1 vs Gen.G and KC vs Dplus at LoL EWC 2026: Finals at the tournament of big upsets
entry.summary: This League of Legends (LoL) event treated us to quite a few spectacular upsets. Even the grand final participants were not actually the teams people expected to see battling for the trophy.

entry.title: Every Fortnite Icon Series skin ever released
entry.summary: Here is a list of every Icon Series skin ever released in Fortnite.

entry.title: The FGC has become too serious and we need more people like Hayao
entry.summary: The FGC has been real serious recently, and we need more whimsy, even if it comes in the form of a shocking tweet from Hayao.

entry.title: “Maybe it’s not actually voluntary": Are esports organizations pressuring VALORANT pros to compete in the EWC? Or does the issue go deeper than that?
entry.summary: Are VALORANT pros being pressured to compete in the EWC or risk losing their role on the team? A finance professional weighs in.

entry.title: Is Counter-Strike 2 going soft? Esports fans react to new comms rule and debate hate speech vs. trash talk
entry.summary: A newly-added rule states that what you say to your own teammates is no longer off-limits to TOs. Will this stop trash talking?

entry.title: Esports has an excellent opportunity to cash in on nostalgia right now
entry.summary: Nostalgia within the gaming industry is a surefire way for developers and publishers to generate huge profits.

entry.title: EA Head of Esports on cross-title strategy and what's next for the Esports World Cup
entry.summary: EA Head of Esports Monica Dinsmore discusses cross-title operations, mobile growth, sports crossover and future Esports World Cup titles.

entry.title: Top Stories Archives - Esports Insider
entry.summary: The Combo Contest is an often overlooked tournament that embodies everything it means to be a Smash player.

entry.title: Latest News Archives - Esports Insider
entry.summary: VALORANT took a massive hit in the viewership department compared to last year. Is the esports scene dying?

entry.title: Games Archives - Esports Insider
entry.summary: LoL esports is usually a battle between China and Korea at the top. MSI completely threw that script away.

entry.title: News Archives
entry.summary: The Ruby Chromesthesia Lucio skin can now be unlocked in Heroes of the Storm. The patch also introduces the mighty Slapathur ability!
